title: Monday.com API tokens should not be disclosed
description: Monday.com is a work management platform. API tokens provide access to all boards, items, columns, and workspace data. Exposing tokens allows unauthorized reading and modification of project management data.
recommendation: Remove Monday.com API tokens from source code. Store in environment variables. Rotate at your_company.monday.com/profile.
impact: Full access to work management data including boards, items, user data, and organizational information.

checks.message: Monday.com API token detected (JWT format). Monday.com API tokens are JWTs that authenticate GraphQL API requests. Exposing this token allows reading all boards, items, and workspace data the account can access, modifying project management data, accessing user and team information, and automating actions on behalf of the user. Rotate immediately at your Monday.com profile settings.
